name: Matzo Meal Mix--Pareve--
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Equal parts matzo meal and cake meal
1 tablespoon Each dried rosemary and oregan.
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a bowl, stirring well to combine.
2. Spoon into a glass jar or container with a lid, leaving 2-inch space at the top. Shake or stir each time before using.
3. Store at room temperature or refrigerate.
Yield: About 1 2/3 cups; recipe may be doubled or tripled as desired.
